attack_chain.description: Attackers compromised a third-party software used by Live Auctioneers, which granted access to the cloud environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Compromised third party software granting access to cloud environment

attack_chain.description: Via the compromised third-party software, attackers leveraged the trusted integration to gain access to Live Auctioneers' cloud environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Compromised third party software granting access to cloud environment

attack_chain.description: Attackers accessed the user database containing names, email addresses, and MD5-hashed passwords/security question answers.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: User database, including MD5 hashed credentials

attack_chain.description: User database records were exfiltrated from the cloud environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Information Compromised: Name; Email Address and Password/Security Question Answers

initial_access_vector: Compromise of third-party software that had access to Live Auctioneers' cloud environment (supply chain / trusted relationship).
persistence_mechanism: Continued access via the compromised third-party software integration (implied; not explicitly described).
